relations.note: Masthead pairing selects one specific gradient from the approved set.
Direction/usage rules apply to the approved gradients.

effect.reserved_for: the approved gradient set (Brand Blue → Dark Navy #00529b → #011E45; Sky Blue → Deep Blue #358CCB → #003D74; Sunshine → 75% Gold #faa31b → Gold @75%; Golden Sand → White → Light Blue #FEF1C8 → #ffffff → #E6F0F9; Golden Sand → 75% Gold → Sunshine #FEF1C8 → Gold @75% → #faa31b; Sunshine → light gold #faa31b → ≈#ffe05c)
effect.subject: brand gradients

quotes: Gradient Specifications (approved set — never invent gradients)

rules.intent: Preserve brand gradient integrity and prevent unapproved gradient creation.
rules.rule_text: Only the approved gradient set may be used; never invent gradients. Approved gradients: Brand Blue → Dark Navy (#00529b → #011E45) for dark backgrounds and blue masthead/waves; Sky Blue → Deep Blue (#358CCB → #003D74) for blue backgrounds and waves; Sunshine → 75% Gold (#faa31b → Gold @75%) for warm backgrounds; Golden Sand → White → Light Blue (#FEF1C8 → #ffffff → #E6F0F9) for soft light backgrounds; Golden Sand → 75% Gold → Sunshine (#FEF1C8 → Gold @75% → #faa31b) for warm light-to-saturated backgrounds; and Sunshine → light gold (#faa31b → ≈#ffe05c). Approved values only.

quotes: Masthead gradient — the gradient to use with the logo mark for contrast; mark sits at the lightest end
Masthead gradient — the gradient to use with the logo mark for contrast; mark sits at the lightest end

rules.intent: Ensure the logo mark reads with adequate contrast on the masthead.
rules.rule_text: The Sunshine → light gold gradient (#faa31b → ≈#ffe05c, 0C,10M,78Y,0K) is the masthead gradient to use with the logo mark for contrast; the mark sits at the lightest end of the gradient.

quotes: Gradients run horizontally in masthead/banner applications (dark/saturated → light, left → right as shown).
Used as backgrounds, in combination with the wave graphic, and with the LISRAYA logo mark.

rules.intent: Standardize gradient orientation and permitted usage contexts.
rules.rule_text: In masthead/banner applications, gradients run horizontally, dark/saturated → light, left → right as shown. Gradients are used as backgrounds, in combination with the wave graphic, and with the LISRAYA logo mark.
